experience.company: U.S. Army Information Systems Engineering Command (USAISEC)
experience.title: IT Specialist Project Engineer
experience.description: Develop, manage and coordinate the implementation of network communications, local area networks (LANs), visual information systems (VIS), and information technology (IT) infrastructure projects.

experience.title: Systems Integration Analyst

experience.title: Functional Area Expert (Command and Control)
experience.description: Communications Engineer supporting the U.S. Army Information Systems Engineering Command (USAISEC) by providing IT engineering services in the form of quick reaction engineering to Engineer, Furnish, Install, and Test (EFIT) total communications functionality at multiple Command and Control (C2) facilities.
